summary: Price Calculator (Hintalaskuri) feature fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend wizard flow works correctly with all 6 services, multi-step wizard, real-time pricing, kotitalousvähennys calculation, and admin-configurable prices. Admin panel 'Laskuri' tab allows viewing/modifying global settings, service base prices, step multipliers, and addons.
passed_tests: GET /api/calculator-config returns 200 with correct structure
Calculator config has 6 services: sisamaalaus, tasoitustyot, mikrosementti, julkisivumaalaus, kattomaalaus, julkisivurappaus
Global settings has required fields: tax_rate, kotitalousvahennys_rate, labor_percentage, material_percentage
Each service has id, name, base_price_per_m2, steps, addons, enabled
Step types are valid (cards or slider)
Admin GET /api/admin/calculator-config requires authentication
Admin GET /api/admin/calculator-config works with valid token
Admin PUT /api/admin/calculator-config requires authentication
Admin can update global settings (tax_rate)
Admin can update service base_price_per_m2
Admin can update step multipliers
Config persists after update and is returned by public endpoint
Price calculator page loads at /hintalaskuri
Calculator shows 6 service cards with correct data-testids
Full wizard flow: select service -> select options -> area slider -> condition -> addons -> result
Price result shows breakdown: labor (70%), materials (30%), addons, ALV, total, kotitalousvähennys, final price
Live price preview shown during wizard steps
Back button navigates to previous step
Request quote button shows contact form
Recalculate button resets calculator to service selection
Admin login and navigate to 'Laskuri' tab
Admin can view global settings (ALV, kotitalousvähennys rate, labor %)
Admin can expand service and view/modify base_price_per_m2
Admin can view/modify step multipliers
Admin can view/modify addons
Admin save button is functional
'Hintalaskuri' link appears in navbar and navigates to calculator page
critical_code_review_comments: PriceCalculatorPage.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CalculatorAdmin.js provides comprehensive admin interface for all calculator settings
Backend calculator-config endpoints properly handle authentication and config persistence
Price calculation logic correctly applies multipliers, addons, tax, and kotitalousvähennys
All 6 services have proper step configurations with cards and slider types

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI flows verified via Playwright

seed_data_creation: Calculator config with 6 services auto-seeded on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Calculator (Hintalaskuri) feature is complete and working. The calculator page at /hintalaskuri allows users to select from 6 services, go through a multi-step wizard (service -> options -> area -> condition -> addons -> result), and see real-time price calculations including kotitalousvähennys. Admin panel 'Laskuri' tab (between 'Alueet' and 'Palvelut') allows configuring global settings and per-service pricing. Key data-testids: price-calculator-page, calculator-title, service-selection, service-card-{id}, step-{id}, option-{id}, area-slider, addons-step, addon-{id}, price-result, final-price, calc-next-btn, calc-back-btn, request-quote-btn, recalculate-btn, calculator-admin, calc-save-btn, calc-global-settings, calc-service-{id}.
